title: First-class Claude Code Runtime Fitting (node-pty engine, selectable peer)

Navigation surface-tour (not an interaction arc) to avoid a write-race on the SHARED compositions/default; interaction proven by committed e2e (6/6) + unit tests.

review.summary: No correctness bugs; mirrors codex/gemini/agent-sdk runtime-fitting conventions (verify path apm_modules/_local/<id>/scripts/probe.mjs, cardinality_hint single<=runtimes(multi), valid config_schema selects, additive library entry).
